name: testtag-for-wordpress
description: Automatically tag any element on your WordPress site with test attributes for Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, or any automation framework.

scripts.test:screenshots: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts
scripts.quick:test: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.wp:docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
